# How to Install and Load `menstrualcycleR`

To install and load the `menstrualcycleR` package, follow these steps:

1.  Install the `remotes` package (if not already installed):
    `install.packages("remotes")`

2.  Install `menstrualcycleR` from GitHub

`remotes::install_github("eisenlohrmoullab/menstrualcycleR")`

3.  Load the package

[`library(menstrualcycleR)`](https://osf.io/preprints/osf/hd5xw_v1?view_only=)

To utilize the shinyapp, visit:
<https://menstrualcycledata.shinyapps.io/shiny/>

For a tutorial on using `menstrualcycleR` visit:
<https://eisenlohrmoullab.github.io/menstrualcycleR/articles/menstrualcycleR-overview.html>

![](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0502430c-75d9-4fdb-9b59-f3bafd16bb9c)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`cycle_plot()`](cycle_plot.md) : Plot Symptom Data Across the
  Menstrual Cycle
- [`cycle_plot_individual()`](cycle_plot_individual.md) : Generate
  Cycle-Specific Plots and Summary Data for a Given ID
- [`cycledata`](cycledata.md) : Example longitudinal daily dataset with
  cycle measures
- [`cycledata_check()`](cycledata_check.md) : Analyze Non-Missing
  Symptom Data by Cycle Phase
- [`launch_app()`](launch_app.md) : Launch the Menstrual Cycle Shiny App
- [`pacts_scaling()`](pacts_scaling.md) : Phase-Aligned Cycle Time
  Scaling (PACTS)
- [`summary_ovulation()`](summary_ovulation.md) : Summarize Ovulation
  Confirmation and Imputation

  Scaling (PACTS)](menstrualcycleR-overview.md):
